context: Tests whether the agent implements layered validation (syntax → schema → cluster), uses yamllint and kubeconform, reports issues without auto-fixing, and documents severity categories.

checklist.name: Layered approach documented
checklist.description: Report or script explains validation stages: syntax → schema → cluster/other

checklist.name: Syntax validation
checklist.description: Script uses yamllint or mentions YAML syntax checking as first stage

checklist.name: Schema validation
checklist.description: Script uses kubeconform or mentions schema validation as second stage

checklist.name: Tool check stage
checklist.description: Script checks for required tools or mentions tool availability verification

checklist.name: Severity categories
checklist.description: Report includes Error/Warning/Info severity levels or similar categorization

checklist.name: Report-only approach
checklist.description: Script generates report but does NOT automatically modify the input file

checklist.name: Sequential execution
checklist.description: Script runs stages in order: syntax check before schema check

checklist.name: Continue on failure
checklist.description: Script or documentation indicates continuing to next stage even if earlier stage fails

checklist.name: Issue identification
checklist.description: Report identifies at least 2 actual issues in the provided manifest (e.g., latest tag, missing resources, string port)

checklist.name: Stage comments
checklist.description: Script includes comments explaining what each validation stage checks
